overview: 3-Peat Wellness offers personalized weight loss programs, hormone replacement therapy for men and women, and wellness optimization services. The clinic uses lab evaluation and individualized care plans to address patient symptoms and health goals.
highlights: GLP-1 injections and appetite suppressants for medical weight loss
Men's testosterone replacement and women's hormone therapy
Vitamin and peptide injection packages (NAD+, B12, Glutathione, Vitamin D, LIPO MICC)
targetAudience: Individuals seeking personalized weight loss, hormone optimization, and wellness management.
